# Support

For bug reports or project discussion, use this repository's normal issue flow when issues are enabled.

For paid engineering review or setup support related to this repository, use:

- Offer: Go CLI/TUI Reliability Review
- Sample deliverable or proof: https://x2.brucelu.top/gotui/sample/
- Ask a pre-sales question: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=gotui&source=github-support-folder-tail
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/gotui/checkout/?source=github-support-folder-tail

Boundary: paid support is engineering review, setup help, or architecture guidance. It does not include managed operation, guaranteed marketplace adoption, or full feature delivery.
